channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: Wilderlands Spawn Reducer
item.description: cuts spawn rates in half

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: More animations
item.description: Better body and face animations

item.title: C&N ServerList Connector
item.description: Connects your VS server to a server listing and voting site

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: VSA_API
item.description: VSA API

item.title: VSA - Replica
item.description: Build block-made moving ships and structures

item.title: C&N Market
item.description: I just need a mod with currency, trade blocks and without d...

item.title: CAN Hide Players Pins
item.description: Pins of players in distance are not shown on the map.

item.title: Animalica - Small & Odd
item.description: Adds the small goober animals like raccoons, chickens, and rabbits as players

item.title: Animalica - Foxes, Wolves & Hyenas
item.description: Adds Foxes, Wolves, and Hyenas as player choices!

item.title: VS Expanded modpack
item.description: A "hardcore" but fair modpack, aiming to expand the game a vanilla-ish way

item.title: Still Greenhouses
item.description: Stops wind sway for greenhouse vegetation.

item.title: Place On Slabs
item.description: Lets you place some stuff on slabs

item.title: Catch and Release: Fish
item.description: Catch fish live and place them in various sized aquariums.

item.title: Catch and Release LIB
item.description: Shared library for Catch and Release mods.

item.title: Compatibility Ecosystem Flora
item.description: Supports for any participants in ecology patches

item.title: Overhaul lib legacy compatibility
item.description: Compat for firearms, crossbows, combatoverhaul

item.title: Combat Overhaul Fork
item.description: 1.22 fork

item.title: Trait Acquirer Modded Class Support
item.description: Rewritten Trait Acquirer to allow all modded classes

item.title: Meliora Meadows Adjustments
item.description: Adjusts A LOT of mods, applying Aldi's Classes trait restrictions and disabling some jsons.

item.title: Wild West Climate
item.description: Makes the west drier, hotter, and more desert-like as you travel across the world.

item.title: Kobold Player Model Redux
item.description: A complete 1.21+ remake of Soi's Kobold player model, for PlayerModelLib by Maltiez!

item.title: Cave-Only Ore Spawns
item.description: Ore spawns only in caves, on the cave walls, plus new modes for more efficent prospecting.

item.title: Dame Elswyth’s Summons
item.description: Find and summon lost pets. Fixes PetAI fire avoidance AI task for tamed pets.

item.title: Advanced Chat
item.description: A fully customizable, movable, resizable chat overlay for Vintage Story. Take control of your chat w

item.title: xSkills Fork
item.description: RPG-style skill system with abilities, perks, and progression.

item.title: RespawnInfo
item.description: Adds a command and a small GUI to check your respawn count and coordinates.
